resources.string: Walkies
a basic background, with a floor and a door.
the dog sprite, in the middle of the screen.
floating food, to drag into the dogs mouth when feeding.
floating sponge, to be dragged across the dog when bathing
go to the burger menu, with different settings and stats
go back, which navigates the user out of their current action (e.g feeding, bathing).
go to dressing, to navigate to the clothes shop
feed the dog to refill the hunger needs.
walk the dog to refill its walk need! opens the map to navigate users on a walk.
go to bathing, to clean your dog,
meat 50c
sock 10c
cheese 35c
broccoli 20c
broccoli, which costs 20 coins and restored 25 hunger points.
cheese, which costs 35 coins and restores 50 hunger points.
meat, which costs 50 coins and restores all 100 hunger points
socks, which costs 10 coins and restores 10 hunger points.
suds, which appear on screen when the dog is being washed
accessory your dog can wear
placeholder
placeholder
